text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: If you wish to be first-rate, you must laugh more elegantly!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Gasp! S-So this is what a first-rate laugh sounds like…

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Please, give me another chance! I shall
keep laughing until my laugh embodies
the elegance of a princess!!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Heh… Such a diligent expression looks
good on you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Continue on, and aim for the highest heights!
May your laughter reach the stars above!
